home.title: Echoes Bistrot · Brunch & Coffee · Ilioupoli, Athens
home.description: Coffee from morning, brunch all day, cocktails if you stay late. Nymfon 33, Ilioupoli.

threshold.identityStrip: Echoes Bistrot · coffee, brunch, cocktails · Nymfon 33, Ilioupoli

firstWord.line: Coffee from morning. Cocktails if you stay late.

throughDoor.caption: Under the awnings, the day slows down.
throughDoor.altExterior: The Echoes facade with bougainvillea and striped awnings
throughDoor.altInterior: View from inside out through the striped awnings, with rattan stools and wrought-iron railing

menu.title: A few dishes. All day.
menu.viewMoreLine: For today’s full menu, call us.

crispyChickenBowl.name: Crispy chicken bowl
crispyChickenBowl.desc: Crispy breaded chicken, romaine, croutons, parmesan.

prosciuttoEgg.name: Thessaloniki koulouri
prosciuttoEgg.desc: Basil pesto, prosciutto, eggs, smoked provolone.

scrambleChorizo.name: Scrambled eggs with chorizo
scrambleChorizo.desc: Soft scrambled eggs, chorizo, avocado, cherry tomatoes, herbs.

eggsToast.name: Eggs on toast
eggsToast.desc: House bread, sunny-side eggs, olive oil, fresh cheese.

goddessBowl.name: Goddess bowl
goddessBowl.desc: Quinoa, seasonal vegetables, hummus, fresh herbs.

beefBurger.name: Beef burger
beefBurger.desc: Brioche, smashed beef patty, house sauces.

milkshake.name: Strawberry milkshake
milkshake.desc: Fresh strawberry, vanilla ice cream, whipped cream.

kitchen.title: The kitchen is open.
kitchen.body: Briki, pass, low heat. The kitchen is open — but it never shouts.
